sanskrit:
य एवं वेत्ति पुरुषं प्रकृतिं च गुणैः सह।
सर्वथा वर्तमानोऽपि न स भूयोऽभिजायते॥
transliteration:
ya evaṃ vetti puruṣaṃ prakṛtiṃ ca guṇaiḥ saha
sarvathā vartamāno 'pi na sa bhūyo 'bhijāyate
literal_meaning: Anyone who thus knows the person (knower), material nature, and the modes together—though situated in any condition—is not born again.
contextual_meaning: Correct cognitive mapping of self, mind, and the forces that shape experience ends compulsive rebirth into the same emotional patterns.
psychological_state: Post-insight stability; the felt safety that comes from understanding the algorithm of suffering.
trigger_scenario: You finally see how your family-of-origin role keeps replaying at work—once you name it, the pattern loses its grip.
anchor_text: Know yourself, your mind, and life’s forces to break repeating emotional cycles.
